synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1720 Moderate: Oracle Linux 7 openssl security update
description:
[1:1.0.2k-26.0.1]
- Fixes CVE-2025-9230 Fix incorrect check of unwrapped key size [Orabug: 38916245]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1720

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1720.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
openssl-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
openssl-devel-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.i686.rpm
openssl-devel-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
openssl-libs-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.i686.rpm
openssl-libs-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
openssl-perl-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
openssl-static-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.i686.rpm
openssl-static-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/openssl-1.0.2k-26.0.1.el7_9.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-9230




Description of changes:

[1:1.0.2k-26.0.1]
- Fixes CVE-2025-9230 Fix incorrect check of unwrapped key size [Orabug: 38916245]
